summary: Tested simplified auth flow (mobile+password only, OTP/Google removed from UI), forgot-password flow, auto-logout fix, JWT 365-day expiry, page UI/testids. All critical flows pass. Backend: 13/14 tests pass (1 skipped because in-memory OTP store can't be read across processes). Frontend: signup E2E, login E2E, network-error-no-logout, real-401-logout all PASS.

issues: Pages render with attractive gradient buttons, MatkaLogo with glow, perks pills, and decorative background blur - design looks premium and brand-aligned. No issues found.

critical_code_review_comments: auth_routes.py is large (~565 lines) and mixes register-mobile, OTP signup, OTP login, Google session (TWO duplicate google handlers: /auth/google-session and /auth/google/session), password reset, admin login. Recommend splitting into auth_password.py / auth_otp.py / auth_google.py / auth_admin.py for maintainability since OTP+Google are now legacy-only.
DUPLICATE Google session endpoints (/auth/google-session and /auth/google/session) — pick one and delete the other to avoid drift.
register-mobile uses raw request.json() instead of a Pydantic model — losing validation/type safety. UserRegister-style Pydantic model recommended.
/auth/me does not return last_seen, auth_method, or referral_code — UI may need these eventually.
auth.py JWT secret read on every call via os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] — fine but consider caching with lru_cache to prevent KeyError surprises if env reloads.

AuthContext.checkAuth: the 'else: keep previous user state' branch only takes effect if user was previously truthy. On initial mount user=null and stored token exists but server is unreachable, the user stays null and ProtectedRoute redirects to /signup until network heals — acceptable but could show a 'reconnecting' UI instead.
Signup/Login axios calls don't honor a global axios baseURL — each page re-reads process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Consolidating into /src/api/client.js would DRY this.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 executed; 1 skipped due to OTP store cross-process limitation)

test_credentials: User 9870012345 / Test@1234 (created during testing). Admin admin@sattamatka.com / Admin@123.
seed_data_creation: Created test user phone=9870012345 name=AuthTest password=Test@1234 via /api/auth/register-mobile. User left in DB for follow-up FE testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 simplified auth verified. Test user phone=9870012345 / Test@1234 is in DB. Admin admin@sattamatka.com / Admin@123. /signup, /login, /forgot-password, /admin-login all working. JWT expiry 365 days verified. Network-error-no-logout verified. Real-401-logout verified by corrupting localStorage token + clearing cookies then reloading (URL redirected to /signup, token removed). Note: Playwright page.route('**/api/auth/me', fulfill 401) does NOT actually intercept through the k8s ingress proxy — to test 401 logout always use a corrupted token + cookie clear approach instead.

verification_details.signup_e2e: POST /api/auth/register-mobile → 200 + token (199 chars), redirect to /dashboard, toast shown
verification_details.jwt_expiry_days: verified ~365 days (within 360-366 tolerance) for both register and login
verification_details.forgot_password: send-otp → 200; reset with wrong otp → 400; correct-otp path requires reading server in-memory store (cannot test cross-process)
verification_details.validation: name<2 → 400, phone<10 digits → 400, password<6 → 400, duplicate phone → 400 — all pass
verification_details.auto_logout_fix_network_error: Intercepted /api/auth/me with route.abort() then reload → user stayed at /dashboard, token retained — PASS
verification_details.auto_logout_fix_real_401: Corrupted localStorage token + cleared cookies + reload → redirected to /signup, token removed — PASS
verification_details.password_toggle: Eye icon click toggles type=password ↔ text on both signup and login
